title: Is ICICI Lombard the BEST Car Insurance for Tata Altroz Owners

description:
On 14 November 2025, my Tata Altroz met with a serious accident.
This short video is not just about a damaged car — it’s about the real struggle that starts after the accident, something no one prepares you for.

After the accident, my car was sent to the Tata Service Center, and I immediately started the insurance claim process with ICICI Lombard. Like most people, I trusted the system and believed the claim would be settled smoothly. But reality turned out to be very different.

It has been more than 1.5 months, and till now, the insurance claim amount has not been credited. Endless follow-ups, calls, emails, survey delays, approvals, and silence — this short video captures the mental stress, frustration, and helplessness that comes with such delays.

Through this video, I share:

How my Tata Altroz accident happened

The step-by-step ICICI Lombard insurance claim process

What actually happens after you submit documents

The struggles of waiting without clear communication

Lessons every car owner should know before an accident happens

This is not a hate video. It’s a real-life experience meant to spread awareness so other car owners are mentally prepared and informed about car insurance claims in India.

If you own a car or are planning to buy one, this short video can save you from future confusion. Accidents can happen to anyone — but the real test begins when you deal with insurance companies.

Watch till the end, share your experience in comments, and let’s help each other with real information.

Music: Bensound
License code: L5UFUSGUIS2JCVEI
Artist: : Theatre Of Delays
fulltitle: Is ICICI Lombard the BEST Car Insurance for Tata Altroz Owners

comments.text:
Instead of purchasing insurance from HDFC or ICICI, I chose Go Digit Insurance for my 10-year-old car because they offered a zero depreciation policy, which was not easily available elsewhere for an older vehicle.
Recently, my car’s front portion was damaged after being hit by a commercial auto. I got the repairs done at an authorized service centre, and the total repair bill amounted to ₹32,000. Go Digit processed the claim smoothly under the cashless facility without any complications. I only had to pay ₹1,000 as file charges, and the remaining amount was settled directly by the insurance company.
Overall, my experience with Go Digit Insurance was hassle-free and satisfactory.
